curve for each token launched via TokenFactory. Fee structure:   - 0.3% on every buy  -> protocol treasury (feeRecipient)   - 0.3% on every sell -> protocol treasury (feeRecipient) Graduation:   Once GRADUATION_TARGET USDT is raised, the token is marked   as graduated. The factory owner can then add liquidity to a DEX. L1 Migration ready:   - feeRecipient is settable -> can point to bridge contract on new L1   - graduated flag signals DEX listing
